posts.author: JDAY (Jared Yousif)
posts.cookedHtml:
Good Afternoon Monday Community,

Anyone have an idea why I can see the connected columns our president made but our coworker cannot see those same connected columns? The dark mode picture is mine and my coworkers is the light mode picture.

Thanks,
Jared

posts.author: Aulysius_Corner_Rep (Mateusz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there!

Great question about Connected Columns Issue. The answer is actually covered in the first episode of our brand new Aulysius Corner series, launched specifically to tackle your questions!

Our team of monday com wizard dives deep into this topic at the very beginning of the video. You can jump right in at the [00:50] mark to see what options there are for Connected Columns.

We cover a bunch of other mysteries in this episode too, so if you have any lingering questions, be sure to check it out:

  1. Go to Youtube
  2. Search → Aulysius Corner 3
  3. Get your problem solved!

Hope this helps!

~ Aulysius Corner Rep
